nodes.label: If this month's Kimi spend already exceeds COST_CAP_MONTHLY_USD,     auto-downgr
nodes.norm_label: if this month's kimi spend already exceeds cost_cap_monthly_usd,     auto-downgr

nodes.label: Raised when Kimi session cost crosses COST_CAP_USD. Halts the run.
nodes.norm_label: raised when kimi session cost crosses cost_cap_usd. halts the run.

nodes.label: Return USD cost of Kimi API calls so far this session.

nodes.label: Extract all text from a PDF.      Tries in order:       1. pdftotext (poppler)
